news.summary:
Operators of illicit fuel stations can earn as much as HK$10,000 (US$1,280) a day by smuggling untaxed petrol into Hong Kong using vehicles equipped with enlarged tanks and selling it to car club members via coded messages, the South China Morning Post has learned.

news.headline: US lifts sanctions on some Iranian oil as gas prices soar
news.summary: The treasury secretary says the move will quickly bring about 140m barrels of oil to global markets.

news.headline: Elon Musk misled Twitter investors, jury finds
news.summary: A San Francisco jury concludes Musk’s claims in 2022 were damaging to a group of Twitter investors.

news.headline: US judge sides with New York Times against Pentagon journalism policies
news.summary: In his ruling, Judge Paul Friedman ruled the Trump administration sought to force out 'disfavoured journalists'.
